name: Bisquick Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix until well incorporated.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Flatten each ball slightly using your fingers or the back of a spoon.
4. Bake at 375°F for 7-8 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
